9.0.4.en: v9.0.3: CRITICAL, CRITICAL, CRITICAL, Fixed 250 duplicate manufacturer names across drivers (3960 -> 1384 unique), Fixed 9 legacy crashy battery handlers (onBatteryPercentageRemainingAttributeReport)

9.0.3.en: v9.0.3: CRITICAL, CRITICAL, CRITICAL, Fixed 250 duplicate manufacturer names across drivers (3960 -> 1384 unique), Fixed 9 legacy crashy battery handlers (onBatteryPercentageRemainingAttributeReport)

9.0.2.changes: Deep YAML/workflow fixes - 78 files validated clean. Optimized .homeyignore to prevent massive archive uploads. Added pre-compact ignores and app.json compactor. Community sync: 122 new FPs from Z2M/ZHA/community/JohanBendz.

9.0.1.changes: Fixed mainsPowered syntax errors in 8 WiFi drivers. Fixed super.onNodeInit params + trailing whitespace. Resolved 93 critical fingerprint collisions. Auto-healed 874 missing fingerprints. Fixed GitHub issues #383, #388, #395. Added Zigbee OTA firmware update infrastructure. Resolved haadeess issues #395, #406, #412. Fixed auto-heal regressions for rain sensor and irrigation valve.

9.0.0.changes: Major release: resolved server-side AggregateError by injecting generic placeholders for template drivers. All 412 Zigbee drivers now have valid manufacturer entries. Community sync: 122 new FPs.

8.5.54.changes: Fixed interactive prompt handling in CI publish step. Switched to official athombv/github-action-homey-app-publish action. Community sync: 122 new FPs.

8.5.53.changes: Auto-confirmed uncommitted changes prompt in CI publish step. Monthly enrichment: 412 drivers, 3364 FPs validated.

8.5.52.changes: Resolved bash syntax error in CI publish step that blocked automated releases.

8.5.51.changes: Restored empty manufacturerName arrays for template drivers. Fixed PRE-CLEAN workflow bug.

8.5.50.changes: Protected mandatory README.txt and multilingual README.*.txt files from root cleanup. Updated Anti-AggregateError gate to exempt generic template drivers.

8.5.49.changes: Removed legacy icon requirement from root cleanup workflow. Updated Dual-Layer gate to exempt generic templates. Added defaults shell to mandatory-files-gate. Root cleanup: archived junk files.

8.5.48.changes: Restored 41 manufacturer fingerprints from git history. Removed 47 empty Zigbee sections from driver compose files. Community sync: 114 new FPs.

8.5.47.changes: Changelog sync and community sync: 114 new FPs from Z2M/ZHA/community/JohanBendz. Monthly enrichment: 412 drivers, 3357 FPs validated. Fingerprint database stabilized after v8.5.46 manufacturerName cleanup.
